# Conventional commits

- Structured commit messages to convey the type of the change.

- Message Syntax template: 

```txt
<type>[optional scope]: <description>
[optional body]
[optional footer]
```

### Types of Changes

- `feat`: A new feature has been added.
- `fix`: A bug has been fixed.
- `docs`: Documentation has been updated.
- `style`: Code style or formatting changes (no functional changes).
- `refactor`: Code has been refactored (no functional changes).
- `test`: Tests have been added or updated.

### Message description
- Concise summary of the change.
- Sacrifice grammar to fit 50 characters.
